split_description: 每月 1-20 train / 21-24 val / 25+ test，且整個 history+target window 必須完整落在同一 split

temporal_partition.missing_date_policy: continuous time_meta is retained for calendar alignment; slots without raw archives are placeholders marked observed_time_mask=False, and downstream training/benchmark exports exclude any history+target window touching unobserved slots
